entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being evaluated for disease resistance and molecular diversity

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to resist fungal diseases

entities.name: MINICORE
entities.description: A subset of world germplasm comprising 188 accessions used for evaluation

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting groundnut leaves

entities.name: SEED COLONIZATION
entities.description: The infection of seeds by A. flavus

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for seed colonization in groundnut

entities.name: RAPD ASSAY
entities.description: A molecular technique used to assess genetic diversity

entities.name: PRIMERS
entities.description: Short DNA sequences used in the RAPD assay to assess diversity

entities.name: MOLECULAR DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation among the groundnut accessions

entities.name: GENETIC SIMILARITY
entities.description: A measure of the genetic relatedness between accessions

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different varieties to develop resistant ones

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: General category of diseases including late leaf spot, rust, and seed colonization
